001/*

003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.lang.reflect.*;
023import java.math.*;
024import java.util.*;
025import java.util.regex.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
031
032/**
033 * Validates values against a {@link JsonSchema} bean per the JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 specification.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * This is the {@code juneau-bean-jsonschema} implementation of the commons-side
037 * {@link PropertyValidator} SPI.  It is registered as a {@link PropertyValidatorFactory} via
038 * {@link java.util.ServiceLoader ServiceLoader} so that marshalling-side code (e.g.
039 * {@code MarshalledPropertyPostProcessor}) can install schema validation closures on bean properties without taking a
040 * compile-time dependency on this module.
041 *
042 * <h5 class='section'>Supported keywords (v1):</h5>
043 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
044 *    <li>Any type: {@code type}, {@code enum}, {@code const}.
045 *    <li>Numeric: {@code minimum}, {@code maximum}, {@code exclusiveMinimum}, {@code exclusiveMaximum},
046 *       {@code multipleOf} (Draft 2020-12 numeric form for the exclusive bounds).
047 *    <li>String: {@code minLength}, {@code maxLength}, {@code pattern}.
048 *    <li>Array: {@code minItems}, {@code maxItems}, {@code uniqueItems}, {@code items} (recursive — single-schema
049 *       form only; tuple form via {@link JsonSchemaArray} is not yet validated).
050 *    <li>Object: {@code minProperties}, {@code maxProperties}, {@code required}, {@code properties} (recursive on
051 *       {@link Map}-shaped values).
052 * </ul>
053 *
054 * <h5 class='section'>Deferred keywords:</h5>
055 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
056 *    <li>{@code format} — informational only by default; validators may treat it as advisory.
057 *    <li>{@code patternProperties}, {@code additionalProperties}, {@code prefixItems}, {@code contains},
058 *       {@code minContains}, {@code maxContains}, {@code dependentRequired}, {@code dependentSchemas}.
059 *    <li>Composition keywords: {@code allOf}, {@code anyOf}, {@code oneOf}, {@code not}, {@code if}/{@code then}/{@code else}.
060 *    <li>References: {@code $ref}, {@code $defs} (the bean carries them; the validator does not resolve them yet).
061 * </ul>
062 *
063 * <h5 class='section'>Descriptive keywords (always ignored):</h5>
064 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
065 *    <li>{@code title}, {@code summary}, {@code description}, {@code examples}, {@code $comment}, {@code deprecated},
066 *       {@code readOnly}, {@code writeOnly}.
067 * </ul>
068 *
069 * <h5 class='section'>Java-value mapping:</h5>
070 * <p>
071 * Java values are matched against JSON Schema {@code type} keywords as follows:
072 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
073 *    <li>{@code string} — {@link CharSequence} or {@link Character}.
074 *    <li>{@code integer} — integral {@link Number} (Byte, Short, Integer, Long, BigInteger) or a floating-point number
075 *       whose value has no fractional part.
076 *    <li>{@code number} — any {@link Number}.
077 *    <li>{@code boolean} — {@link Boolean}.
078 *    <li>{@code array} — {@link Collection} or Java array.
079 *    <li>{@code object} — {@link Map} or any other reference type (treated as a bean — the marshalling layer installs
080 *       separate validators on the bean's own {@code @Schema}-annotated properties).
081 *    <li>{@code null} — {@code null}.
082 *    <li>{@code any} — always matches.
083 * </ul>
084 *
085 * <h5 class='section'>Nested validation:</h5>
086 * <p>
087 * For property-level validation, the validator recurses into:
088 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
089 *    <li>{@code items} — every element of an array / collection is validated against the items schema.
090 *    <li>{@code properties} on a {@link Map} value — each declared sub-property is validated against its sub-schema.
091 * </ul>
092 *
093 * <p>
094 * The validator does <b>not</b> recurse into Java beans via reflection.  Inner {@code @Schema} annotations on a
095 * nested bean's own properties are validated independently by the marshalling layer's per-property install hooks.
096 *
097 * <h5 class='section'>Thread safety:</h5>
098 * Instances are immutable and safe to share across threads.  The compiled {@link Pattern} for the {@code pattern}
099 * keyword is cached on construction.
100 *
101 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
102 *    <li class='link'><a href="https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/json-schema-validation.html">JSON Schema 2020-12 Validation</a>
103 * </ul>
104 *
105 * @see PropertyValidator
106 * @see JsonSchemaPropertyValidatorFactory
107 * @since 10.0.0
108 */
109public final class JsonSchemaValidator implements PropertyValidator {
110
111   private static final JsonSerializer JSON_FOR_EQ = JsonSerializer.DEFAULT;
112
113   private final JsonSchema schema;
114   private final Pattern patternCache;
115
116   /**
117    * Builds a validator from a {@link JsonSchema} bean.
118    *
119    * @param schema The schema to validate against.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
120    * @return A new validator.
121    */
122   public static JsonSchemaValidator of(JsonSchema schema) {
123      assertArgNotNull("schema", schema);
124      return new JsonSchemaValidator(schema);
125   }
126
127   /**
128    * Builds a validator from a JSON-Schema-shaped {@link JsonMap}.
129    *
130    * <p>
131    * Equivalent to {@code of(JsonSchemaBeanGenerator.toBean(schemaMap))}.
132    *
133    * @param schemaMap The schema map.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
134    * @return A new validator.
135    */
136   public static JsonSchemaValidator of(JsonMap schemaMap) {
137      assertArgNotNull("schemaMap", schemaMap);
138      return of(JsonSchemaBeanGenerator.toBean(schemaMap));
139   }
140
141   private JsonSchemaValidator(JsonSchema schema) {
142      this.schema = schema;
143      var p = schema.getPattern();
144      this.patternCache = p == null ? null : Pattern.compile(p);
145   }
146
147   /**
148    * Returns the schema this validator was built from.
149    *
150    * @return The schema.
151    */
152   public JsonSchema getSchema() {
153      return schema;
154   }
155
156   @Override
157   public void validate(Object value) throws SchemaValidationException {
158      validateAgainst(schema, value, patternCache);
159   }
160
161   @SuppressWarnings({
162      "java:S3776"  // Cognitive complexity — dispatch table over the JSON Schema keyword set.
163   })
164   private static void validateAgainst(JsonSchema s, Object value, Pattern patternOverride) {
165      validateEnum(s, value);
166      validateConst(s, value);
167
168      if (value == null)
169         return;
170
171      validateType(s, value);
172
173      if (value instanceof CharSequence cs) {
174         validateString(s, cs.toString(), patternOverride);
175      } else if (value instanceof Character ch) {
176         validateString(s, ch.toString(), patternOverride);
177      } else if (value instanceof Number n) {
178         validateNumber(s, n);
179      } else if (value instanceof Collection<?> c) {
180         validateArray(s, c);
181      } else if (value.getClass().isArray()) {
182         validateArray(s, arrayAsList(value));
183      } else if (value instanceof Map<?,?> m) {
184         validateObject(s, m);
185      }
186      // Java beans: per-property @Schema validators are installed independently on the bean side.
187   }
188
189   // =================================================================================================================
190   // Type / enum / const
191   // =================================================================================================================
192
193   private static void validateEnum(JsonSchema s, Object value) {
194      var enums = s.getEnum();
195      if (e(enums))
196         return;
197      for (var e : enums) {
198         if (jsonEquals(e, value))
199            return;
200      }
201      throw new SchemaValidationException("Value ''{0}'' does not match one of the allowed enum values.", value);
202   }
203
204   private static void validateConst(JsonSchema s, Object value) {
205      var c = s.getConst();
206      if (c == null)
207         return;  // const=null is indistinguishable from "not set" in the bean; treat as unset.
208      if (! jsonEquals(c, value))
209         throw new SchemaValidationException("Value ''{0}'' does not match required const ''{1}''.", value, c);
210   }
211
212   private static void validateType(JsonSchema s, Object value) {
213      var single = s.getTypeAsJsonType();
214      if (nn(single)) {
215         if (! matchesType(single, value))
216            throw new SchemaValidationException("Value of type ''{0}'' does not match expected schema type ''{1}''.", typeName(value), single);
217         return;
218      }
219      var arr = s.getTypeAsJsonTypeArray();
220      if (e(arr))
221         return;
222      for (var t : arr) {
223         if (matchesType(t, value))
224            return;
225      }
226      throw new SchemaValidationException("Value of type ''{0}'' does not match any expected schema types ''{1}''.", typeName(value), arr);
227   }
228
229   @SuppressWarnings({
230      "java:S1142"  // Multiple returns — switch arms each return their own predicate result.
231   })
232   private static boolean matchesType(JsonType t, Object value) {
233      switch (t) {
234         case STRING:
235            return value instanceof CharSequence || value instanceof Character;
236         case INTEGER:
237            return isIntegralValue(value);
238         case NUMBER:
239            return value instanceof Number;
240         case BOOLEAN:
241            return value instanceof Boolean;
242         case ARRAY:
243            return value instanceof Collection<?> || (nn(value) && value.getClass().isArray());
244         case OBJECT:
245            return value instanceof Map<?,?> || isBeanLike(value);
246         case NULL:
247            return value == null;
248         case ANY:
249            return true;
250         default:
251            return true;
252      }
253   }
254
255   private static boolean isIntegralValue(Object value) {
256      if (value instanceof Byte || value instanceof Short || value instanceof Integer || value instanceof Long || value instanceof BigInteger)
257         return true;
258      if (value instanceof Number n) {
259         try {
260            var bd = toBigDecimal(n);
261            return bd.stripTrailingZeros().scale() <= 0;
262         } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
263            return false;
264         }
265      }
266      return false;
267   }
268
269   private static boolean isBeanLike(Object value) {
270      if (value == null)
271         return false;
272      var c = value.getClass();
273      return ! (value instanceof CharSequence || value instanceof Character || value instanceof Number
274         || value instanceof Boolean || value instanceof Collection<?> || c.isArray());
275   }
276
277   private static String typeName(Object value) {
278      return value == null ? "null" : cns(value);
279   }
280
281   // =================================================================================================================
282   // String
283   // =================================================================================================================
284
285   private static void validateString(JsonSchema s, String value, Pattern patternOverride) {
286      var minL = s.getMinLength();
287      var maxL = s.getMaxLength();
288      var len = value.codePointCount(0, value.length());
289      if (nn(minL) && len < minL)
290         throw new SchemaValidationException("String length {0} is less than minLength {1}.", len, minL);
291      if (nn(maxL) && len > maxL)
292         throw new SchemaValidationException("String length {0} exceeds maxLength {1}.", len, maxL);
293      var pattern = patternOverride;
294      if (pattern == null && nn(s.getPattern()))
295         pattern = Pattern.compile(s.getPattern());
296      if (pattern != null && ! pattern.matcher(value).find())
297         throw new SchemaValidationException("Value ''{0}'' does not match pattern ''{1}''.", value, s.getPattern());
298   }
299
300   // =================================================================================================================
301   // Number
302   // =================================================================================================================
303
304   @SuppressWarnings({
305      "java:S3776"  // Numeric keyword fan-out is intentionally flat; each branch maps to one Draft 2020-12 keyword.
306   })
307   private static void validateNumber(JsonSchema s, Number value) {
308      BigDecimal bd;
309      try {
310         bd = toBigDecimal(value);
311      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
312         throw new SchemaValidationException("Value ''{0}'' is not a finite number.", value);
313      }
314
315      if (nn(s.getMinimum()) && bd.compareTo(toBigDecimal(s.getMinimum())) < 0)
316         throw new SchemaValidationException("Value {0} is less than minimum {1}.", bd, s.getMinimum());
317      if (nn(s.getMaximum()) && bd.compareTo(toBigDecimal(s.getMaximum())) > 0)
318         throw new SchemaValidationException("Value {0} exceeds maximum {1}.", bd, s.getMaximum());
319      if (nn(s.getExclusiveMinimum()) && bd.compareTo(toBigDecimal(s.getExclusiveMinimum())) <= 0)
320         throw new SchemaValidationException("Value {0} is not greater than exclusive minimum {1}.", bd, s.getExclusiveMinimum());
321      if (nn(s.getExclusiveMaximum()) && bd.compareTo(toBigDecimal(s.getExclusiveMaximum())) >= 0)
322         throw new SchemaValidationException("Value {0} is not less than exclusive maximum {1}.", bd, s.getExclusiveMaximum());
323      if (nn(s.getMultipleOf())) {
324         var mof = toBigDecimal(s.getMultipleOf());
325         if (mof.signum() != 0 && bd.remainder(mof).compareTo(BigDecimal.ZERO) != 0)
326            throw new SchemaValidationException("Value {0} is not a multiple of {1}.", bd, mof);
327      }
328   }
329
330   // =================================================================================================================
331   // Array
332   // =================================================================================================================
333
334   private static void validateArray(JsonSchema s, Collection<?> value) {
335      var min = s.getMinItems();
336      var max = s.getMaxItems();
337      var size = value.size();
338      if (nn(min) && size < min)
339         throw new SchemaValidationException("Array size {0} is less than minItems {1}.", size, min);
340      if (nn(max) && size > max)
341         throw new SchemaValidationException("Array size {0} exceeds maxItems {1}.", size, max);
342      if (Boolean.TRUE.equals(s.getUniqueItems()) && hasDuplicates(value))
343         throw new SchemaValidationException("Array contains duplicate items but uniqueItems is true.");
344      var items = s.getItemsAsSchema();
345      if (nn(items)) {
346         for (var item : value)
347            validateAgainst(items, item, null);
348      }
349   }
350
351   private static List<Object> arrayAsList(Object array) {
352      var len = Array.getLength(array);
353      var out = new ArrayList<>(len);
354      for (var i = 0; i < len; i++)
355         out.add(Array.get(array, i));
356      return out;
357   }
358
359   private static boolean hasDuplicates(Collection<?> c) {
360      if (c.size() < 2)
361         return false;
362      var seen = new ArrayList<>(c.size());
363      for (var e : c) {
364         for (var s : seen) {
365            if (jsonEquals(e, s))
366               return true;
367         }
368         seen.add(e);
369      }
370      return false;
371   }
372
373   // =================================================================================================================
374   // Object (Map / bean shape)
375   // =================================================================================================================
376
377   @SuppressWarnings({
378      "java:S3776"  // Cognitive complexity — flat fan-out over the Draft 2020-12 object keywords (min/maxProperties, required, properties).
379   })
380   private static void validateObject(JsonSchema s, Map<?,?> value) {
381      var minP = s.getMinProperties();
382      var maxP = s.getMaxProperties();
383      var size = value.size();
384      if (nn(minP) && size < minP)
385         throw new SchemaValidationException("Object property count {0} is less than minProperties {1}.", size, minP);
386      if (nn(maxP) && size > maxP)
387         throw new SchemaValidationException("Object property count {0} exceeds maxProperties {1}.", size, maxP);
388      var required = s.getRequired();
389      if (nn(required)) {
390         for (var key : required) {
391            if (! value.containsKey(key))
392               throw new SchemaValidationException("Required property ''{0}'' is missing.", key);
393         }
394      }
395      var props = s.getProperties();
396      if (nn(props)) {
397         for (var entry : props.entrySet()) {
398            var name = entry.getKey();
399            var sub = entry.getValue();
400            if (value.containsKey(name))
401               validateAgainst(sub, value.get(name), null);
402         }
403      }
404   }
405
406   // =================================================================================================================
407   // Helpers
408   // =================================================================================================================
409
410   private static BigDecimal toBigDecimal(Number n) {
411      if (n instanceof BigDecimal bd)
412         return bd;
413      if (n instanceof BigInteger bi)
414         return new BigDecimal(bi);
415      if (n instanceof Long || n instanceof Integer || n instanceof Short || n instanceof Byte)
416         return BigDecimal.valueOf(n.longValue());
417      return new BigDecimal(n.toString());
418   }
419
420   @SuppressWarnings({
421      "java:S3776"  // Equality fan-out — mirrors the type matrix exposed by deserialized JSON Schema bean values.
422   })
423   private static boolean jsonEquals(Object a, Object b) {
424      if (a == b)
425         return true;
426      if (a == null || b == null)
427         return false;
428      if (a instanceof Number an && b instanceof Number bn)
429         return toBigDecimal(an).compareTo(toBigDecimal(bn)) == 0;
430      if (a instanceof Number an && b instanceof CharSequence cs) {
431         var bd = tryAsBigDecimal(cs.toString());
432         return nn(bd) && toBigDecimal(an).compareTo(bd) == 0;
433      }
434      if (b instanceof Number bn && a instanceof CharSequence cs) {
435         var bd = tryAsBigDecimal(cs.toString());
436         return nn(bd) && toBigDecimal(bn).compareTo(bd) == 0;
437      }
438      if (a instanceof CharSequence csa && b instanceof CharSequence csb)
439         return csa.toString().equals(csb.toString());
440      if (a.equals(b))
441         return true;
442      try {
443         return JSON_FOR_EQ.toString(a).equals(JSON_FOR_EQ.toString(b));
444      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") Exception e) {
445         return false;
446      }
447   }
448
449   private static BigDecimal tryAsBigDecimal(String s) {
450      try {
451         return new BigDecimal(s);
452      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
453         return null;
454      }
455   }
456}
